title: Furnaces: Refueled
description: Fully animated furnace variants with animated side and dedicated bottom textures.
body:
# Furnaces: Refueled
*Brings life to furnace workstations with comprehensive animations on all sides and the top, creating more immersive smelting arrays that are easier to read. Never get confused by the state of a furnace again!*

## Features
  - Blast Furnace with 2 stages of animation with centered texture design
  - Smoker with 3 stages of detailed animation
  - Furnace with 4 stages of animation on sides/top, 8 on front
  - Dedicated bottom textures for all furnace variants
  - Animated side and top textures for complete visual effect

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!

## Credits
- [Animated Furnace](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/animated-furnace/) by: [Iceologer](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/iceologer/)
- [Animated Furnaces](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/animated-furnaces-4718601/) by: [Daggsy](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/daggsy/)
